---
name: Feature or RFC｜主 Issue
about: Record a feature, process change, or design proposal before implementation
title: '[RFC]: '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''

---

## Summary｜摘要
Describe the proposed feature, process change, or design adjustment.

## Problem Statement｜问题定义
Describe the current limitation, gap, or motivation.

## Goals｜目标
-

## Non-Goals｜非目标
-

## Constraints｜约束条件
-

## Proposed Direction｜方案方向
Describe the proposed direction at a high level. Implementation details may be tracked in sub-issues.

## Acceptance Criteria｜验收标准
-

## Planned Sub-issues｜计划拆分的子任务
- [ ] Analysis
- [ ] Implementation
- [ ] Verification

## Additional Context｜补充信息
Add any links, screenshots, or related issues here.
